div.head: The Minister in Uruguay (Wilson) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 304. Your 159, December 12, 8 p.m. I have advised both Costa and Charlone of the information regarding the credits.

Charlone was disappointed that no approval has yet been given to the request for $5,000,000 for national defense. He asked that Pierson be informed that he attaches vastly more importance to the credit for
this purpose (for as long term as possible) than to the other credits and that he hopes affirmative action on this request will be taken soon. I should appreciate receiving any information available in this connection.
